subcodes.first_line: The Bayán hath given glad-tidings unto all who dwell within the realm of contingent being of this most mighty Revelation, proclaiming: "Verily, He Who shall come, He is..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بشر البیان من فی الامکان بهذا الظهور العظیم قال ان الذی یاتی انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
